questionHtml:
Which describes a resonance structure?

A.  Double bond can be drawn in alternative positions.

B.  Bonds vibrate by absorbing IR radiation.

C.  A double and a single bond in the molecule

D.  A Lewis structure

meta.title: Which describes a resonance structure? A. Double bond can be drawn in alternative positions. B. Bonds vibrate by absorbing IR radiation. C. A double and a single bond in the molecu
